behavioral_specificity_notes: Mentions '5 argument URI constructor' as the solution but doesn't explain why or how it works

contains: References to JDK issue tracker (two bug IDs)
General solution approach (use 5 argument URI constructor)
missing: Detailed explanation of the JDK bug and its impact
Why the 5 argument constructor works around it
Error handling for the new approach
